race.comment: BARONESS DU LAC (11) is a filly by Brazen Beau out of Enchanting Beauty on debut. Promising type who scored a comfortable trial win. Looks set for a bright start to her career. DEFY GRAVITY (4) is a son of Dirty Work on debut for the Clarken team. Has come along nicely at the trials and is drawn to advantage. Should be making his presence felt. ARTISTIC ANGEL (10) returns after five months in the paddock. Tackled some strong maidens last campaign without causing too much of a threat. Looks to have come on nicely during the break, stripping fitter for a trial and is worth monitoring. DEBRALEE (6) has been showing good speed but tiring late in her three runs back off a 455-day spell. Has been freshened with 56 days and is capable of playing a role.
